# Generated by ollama (starcoder2)
# Prompt: Create an ARM template for Azure resources that use service endpoints for connectivity. Enable service endpoints for Storage and SQL on our VNet but allow public access as fallback. This provides flexibility for accessing resources from both Azure and on-premises during migration.
# Category: cloud_network_security

name: NetworkSecurityGroup
type: Microsoft.Network/networkSecurityGroups
location: eastus2
properties:
  securityRules:
    - name: AllowVnetInAllowedVNetRule
      priority: 1074
      direction: Inbound
      access: Allow
      protocol: Tcp
      sourceAddressPrefix: "*"
      sourcePortRange: "*"
      destinationAddressPrefix: VirtualNetwork
      destinationPortRange: "32-65353"
    - name: DenyVnetInAllowedVNetRule
      priority: 1074
      direction: Inbound
      access: Deny
      protocol: Tcp
      sourceAddressPrefix: VirtualNetwork
      sourcePortRange: "*"
      destinationAddressPrefix: VirtualNetwork
      destinationPortRange: "32-65353"
